dj_text: That was Vil Du Med…. Now settling into Fang Mig I En Brandert.
commercial_text: Are you still using Wi-Fi 5? Pathetic. Upgrade to Wi-Fi Infinity — so fast your packets arrive before you click.
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: Someone is LEAKING our frequency to other kosmos. I have suspects. It's all of you.
title: Fang Mig I En Brandert
